name: THE LONG MAN
containment: SCP-7744 has not been successfully contained. All field teams are to maintain minimum 200m distance. Radio communication is not to be used within range of SCP-7744. Do not engage alone under any circumstances.
description: Bipedal entity of estimated height 3.7m. Limb proportions far exceed anatomical possibility. No facial features have been observed on any occasion. Subject produces anomalous ████████ in all personnel within approximately 30m. Known to specifically target individuals separated from their group.
addendum: SCP-7744 was last confirmed near this operational area 48 hours prior to this briefing. ████████████████. Do not approach.
